notes: The traditional meaning of 2.40 — the unique safety properties of karma-yoga; two negations and one promise; even a little of THIS dharma rescues from saṁsāric fear; the discipline-specific restriction of the safety claim — is preserved in the engineering layer with EXPLICIT MARKING of the restriction. The engineering layer says: 'a narrow claim with two negations and one promise — all concerning a specific discipline (karma-yoga, action without attachment to fruits) and NOT effort generically.' This is the load-bearing fidelity move — without this restriction the verse becomes the 'every little thing helps' misreading that the commentators all guard against. The contrast structure (vs agriculture / vs medicine / vs ritual) is preserved, and the engineering analog (chaos drills as karma-yoga structure vs fruit-attached features as agriculture-or-ritual structure) operationalizes the contrast without flattening it. No inversion. PASS.
